name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Pittsfield, IL's Farmers State Bank branch at 108 E Adams St offers personal and business banking services in downtown.
description_long:
Located at 108 E Adams St in downtown Pittsfield, IL, the Farmers State Bank branch is a standalone banking facility serving the local community. This Pittsfield location offers convenient in-person banking with both walk-in counter service and drive-through access. For specific operating hours at this Pittsfield branch, customers are encouraged to call ahead or check the bank's website.

At this Farmers State Bank location in Pittsfield, IL, the branch team offers comprehensive personal and business banking services including deposit accounts, lending products, and financial services. Whether you need to open a checking account, secure a loan, or conduct business banking, the staff at this downtown Pittsfield branch can assist. Visit in person at 108 E Adams St or contact the branch for specific account terms and service details.

For Pittsfield residents and business owners, having local banking access at 108 E Adams St means you can handle your financial needs without traveling outside the city. When visiting this Pittsfield branch, bring your ID and any relevant account documentation. The downtown Pittsfield location makes it convenient to combine banking with other errands in the area.
services: Online banking platform with login access
Online account access and payment tracking
Payment history and bill history viewing
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Same-day bill pay option available to meet urgent payment deadlines
Free online bill pay with recurring payment scheduling capability
Online banking platform with e-statements and payment tracking
Active customer security awareness messaging about spoofing scams
Payment guarantee that bills arrive on time when scheduled properly
Platinum Visa credit card product available to customers
cons: Website provides minimal information about loan products, rates, or fees
Limited details on deposit account types, interest rates, or minimum balances
No information about geographic service area or branch locations
Customer service contact limited to phone line; no chat or email options clearly stated
Website warns that web messages are not secure and shouldn't include sensitive information
best_for: Community bank customers seeking FDIC-protected checking and savings accounts
Small business owners needing local banking relationships and business accounts
Bill-conscious consumers who need same-day payment capability for urgent bills
Customers preferring traditional banks over online-only neobanks
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for customers seeking traditional FDIC-insured community banking with online convenience features, particularly those who value same-day bill pay capability. The main caveat is that their website provides limited transparency on specific products, rates, and fees—customers should contact the bank directly at (217) 285-5585 for detailed account and lending information before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Farmers State Bank at 108 E Adams St, Pittsfield, IL. Downtown banking with personal and business services.
